name: expo/vanilla
notes: Expo Router (vanilla) Ring 1 scenario. Init lives at the root `app/_layout.tsx` so every route mounts under one provider. Env prefix is EXPO_PUBLIC_ — Expo inlines these at bundle time without leaking the secret into native binaries. Build command is `expo export --platform web` so Layer 3 doesn't require Xcode/Android tooling on Linux runners. integrationHint=expo isn't yet in the wizard's Integration enum (skill / detector drift sidebar in docs/evals.md), so useDetection is false — the runner won't pass --integration to the wizard, and live runs must rely on detection finding the Expo skill via package.json signals.
